sections.label: Chorus
lines: En in hing ta in, En in hing ta in;
Nang aa ding sing tung sihna en in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na mawh van gik kha hong gum ding hiam
Nun’ tak tawn tung na na nei ding maw
bek in hong hon zo thei hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Han pan a tho Jesuh en le ci’n
Man lang in inn dei sung om lai in

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh’n van nun’ nuam hong bawl sak hi
Lung kham mawh nei mi’ sapna hong
Napai na peuhah hong kha ding hi
